title: Rockabye
writer: Jane Murfin, Lucia Bronder, Kubec Glasmon
actors: Constance Bennett, Joel McCrea, Paul Lukas
plot: Actress Judy Carroll, from the gas-house district has been trained, educated and developed so well by her manager, that not even the publicity-seeking world of the theater has guessed her antecedents. But she has not loved well or...
